nav.footer_text: Civitas Platform. Empowering citizens through transparent governance.

home.hero_subtitle: Join secure, transparent, and digital ROSCA groups. Build your trust score and access dual-payout options today.
home.why_desc: Building trust through transparency and empowering communities to make informed financial decisions together.
home.feature_trust_desc: Track your participation and build credibility through verified contributions to ROSCA groups.
home.feature_mgmt_desc: Join or create savings committees, collaborate with members, and manage contributions seamlessly.
home.feature_analytics_desc: Monitor contribution patterns, payout schedules, and group performance with powerful analytics tools.
home.feature_payout_desc: Flexible payout structures designed to meet your financial goals with transparency and fairness.
home.feature_trans_desc: Access complete transaction histories and contribution records to ensure accountability at every level.
home.feature_docs_desc: Review agreements, meeting minutes, and committee records in one centralized, encrypted platform.
home.dashboard_preview_desc: Everything you need to manage your ROSCA groups in one place.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.content: Welcome to Civitas. By joining a committee, you agree to the following rules: First, Financial Responsibility: You strictly commit to paying your monthly installments on time. Failure to pay will negatively impact your Trust Score and harm your fellow committee members. Second, Platform Role: Civitas is a management platform designed to ensure transparency. We securely record transactions and automate payouts, but we do not act as a bank. Third, Security and Privacy: Your personal data, identity, and financial records are fully encrypted and kept strictly confidential. By proceeding, you pledge to maintain the trust of your community.
